channel.title: Peter Farrar Portraits — Journal
channel.description: Portrait photography insights, session stories and inspiration from Peter Farrar Portraits, Basingstoke, Hampshire.

item.title: Building Confidence
item.description: Discover how a relaxed portrait session transformed one young woman's confidence. From feeling self conscious about braces to loving over 40 beautiful portraits, see how preparation and trust create natural, authentic photography.

item.title: Basingstoke Portrait Photographer
item.description: I am a portrait photographer based in Basingstoke, creating natural, expressive and honest portraits for individuals, families, performers and professionals across Hampshire.

item.title: Portrait of a Fighter
item.description: A gritty, authentic portrait of a real boxer fresh from sparring, captured with dramatic split lighting and raw intensity.

item.title: A Busy Few Weeks Behind the Scenes
item.description: Learn how automation is helping free up time for photography, plus details on free portrait shoots for aspiring male models.
